_README: Application-fact profile. Contact details (name, email, phone, location, linkedin, github, website) are pulled from experience.json — do NOT duplicate them here. This file holds the EXTRA facts that job-application forms ask for. Copy this to application.json (gitignored) and fill in your real values. HONESTY RULE: only put true values here; leave a field empty ('') or null if you don't want to assert it, and the autofiller will skip it or ask. EEO/demographic fields default to 'Decline to self-identify', which is always safe and honest.

work_authorization._note: Set the two booleans to your TRUE status. If null, the autofiller leaves these fields blank and flags them for you to answer manually — it will never guess your work authorization.

screening._note: These are common knock-out screener questions. Verify each is true for you.

eeo._note: US EEO/demographic self-ID. Legally optional. 'Decline to self-identify' is always a valid, honest answer and is the default here. Change only if you choose to disclose.
eeo.veteran_status: I am not a protected veteran
eeo.disability_status: I do not wish to answer

documents._note: resume_strategy: 'tailored' uses the per-job resume the app generated for this company/role if one exists, else falls back to a default. 'default' always uses default_resume_path.

defaults._note: Fallback free-text answers. Leave empty to have the LLM draft a grounded answer per question instead.
